title: cyperus filicinus f. cleaveri
intro: Cyperus filicinus f. cleaveri, also known as the Cyperus papyrus variety, is a type of sedge plant native to Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and bronchodilatory properties. Cyperus filicinus f. cleaveri is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and its root is also used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and ointments.
